message:
feat(tldr): robust touch/pointer handling and expanded E2E coverage

tldr-synergy-diagram: Comprehensive interaction overhaul with 224-line diff
adding proper device capability detection and touch support:
- Added DIAGRAM_POINTER_QUERY constant for hover/pointer detection
- Implemented getHasFinePointer() for SSR-safe pointer capability check
- Added refs for touch hover reset, scroll fix, highlight timeout, and
  card highlight tracking to prevent memory leaks
- lastTouchActivationRef for debouncing rapid touch events
- hasFinePointer state with proper SSR hydration handling
- shouldAnimateDiagram now respects both reducedMotion and hasFinePointer
- New callbacks: clearTouchHoverState, clearCardHighlight, applyNodeHighlight,
  handleNodeLeave for explicit state management
- Touch events now properly set visual ring highlight with 1.5s auto-clear
- Fixed hydration mismatch by avoiding window.matchMedia during SSR

bakery-visualizations: Minor 6-line adjustment for consistency.

tldr-tool-grid: Removed 1 unnecessary line.

tests/e2e/tldr-diagram.spec.ts: Expanded E2E test suite with 299-line diff
(net +140 lines) covering:
- Device capability detection scenarios
- Touch interaction workflows
- Highlight timeout behavior
- Scroll interaction edge cases
- Cross-browser pointer event handling

tests/e2e/tldr-performance.spec.ts: Adjusted 25 lines for improved
performance measurement accuracy.

Note: .tmp/, lcp-debug.mjs, playwright-prod.config.ts excluded as
ephemeral development/debugging artifacts.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
